name: z-bot-workspace
description: AI agent platform with Web dashboard and CLI

scripts.daemon:watch: watchexec -r --poll 2s -w gateway/gateway-execution/src -w gateway/gateway-database/src -w gateway/src -w runtime/agent-tools/src -w runtime/agent-runtime/src -w services/knowledge-graph/src -w apps/daemon/src -e rs -- cargo run -p daemon -- --static-dir ./dist
scripts.daemon:surreal:watch: watchexec -r --poll 2s -w gateway/gateway-execution/src -w gateway/gateway-database/src -w gateway/src -w runtime/agent-tools/src -w runtime/agent-runtime/src -w services/knowledge-graph/src -w apps/daemon/src -w stores/zero-stores-surreal/src -e rs -- cargo run -p daemon --features surreal-backend -- --static-dir ./dist
